---
title: "Resources"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          body {
            background: #0F2143;
            color: #ffffff;
          }
          h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6,
          .meta,
          .page-subtitle {
            color: #ffffff;
          }
          .media-card {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
          }
          .media-card a,
          .media-card a:visited {
            color: #ffffff;
            text-decoration: underline;
          }
          .media-card a:hover,
          .media-card a:focus-visible {
            color: #dbe8ff;
            text-decoration: underline;
          }
          .media-grid .meta {
            color: #D4D4D4;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
          }
        </style>
---
